revision.comment: added bit to make template sortable
inserted Y (makes a column of Y/N icons be sortable in CLASS="sortable" tables, but doesn't change anything to width/display/layout)
Added parameter to control icon size. Now {{Y|10px}} does the obvious.
Stole idea from {{Check}} and made "px" suffix to parameter implciit. Now it's {{Y|10}}
Adding alt-text to image so that it sorts and is more useful for screen-readers; see request on [[Template talk:Tick]].
don't link, per WP:ALT and [[Template_talk:Tick|talkpage request]]
changing alt text to match graphic rather than spoken word
Adding protection template to a protected page) (bot
{{redr}} is deprecated - converting to {{Redirect category shell|}} using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}</noinclude>#REDIRECT [[Template:Aye]]

{{Redirect category shell|
{{R from template shortcut}}
}}

[[Category:Checkmark insertion templates]]

revision.comment: move to padlock call to avoid breaking redirect
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/222.120.74.250|222.120.74.250]] ([[User talk:222.120.74.250|talk]]) to last version by Gmaxwell
added bit to make template sortable
inserted Y (makes a column of Y/N icons be sortable in CLASS="sortable" tables, but doesn't change anything to width/display/layout)
Added parameter to control icon size. Now {{Y|10px}} does the obvious.
Stole idea from {{Check}} and made "px" suffix to parameter implciit. Now it's {{Y|10}}
Adding alt-text to image so that it sorts and is more useful for screen-readers; see request on [[Template talk:Tick]].
don't link, per WP:ALT and [[Template_talk:Tick|talkpage request]]
changing alt text to match graphic rather than spoken word
Adding protection template to a protected page) (bot
{{redr}} is deprecated - converting to {{Redirect category shell|}} using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}</noinclude>#REDIRECT [[Template:Aye]]

}}

revision.comment: move to padlock call to avoid breaking redirect
added bit to make template sortable
inserted Y (makes a column of Y/N icons be sortable in CLASS="sortable" tables, but doesn't change anything to width/display/layout)
Added parameter to control icon size. Now {{Y|10px}} does the obvious.
Stole idea from {{Check}} and made "px" suffix to parameter implciit. Now it's {{Y|10}}
Adding alt-text to image so that it sorts and is more useful for screen-readers; see request on [[Template talk:Tick]].
don't link, per WP:ALT and [[Template_talk:Tick|talkpage request]]
changing alt text to match graphic rather than spoken word
Adding protection template to a protected page) (bot
{{redr}} is deprecated - converting to {{Redirect category shell|}} using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]

Changed protection level for "[[Template:Y]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{pp-template|small=yes}}</noinclude>#REDIRECT [[Template:Aye]]

{{Redirect category shell|
{{R from template shortcut}}
}}

[[Category:Checkmark insertion templates]]

revision.comment: move to padlock call to avoid breaking redirect
Bot: fix double redirect to final target
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
